summary:
Valproic acid does not improve survival in patients with diffuse intrinsic pontine glioma; its role is limited to symptomatic relief such as reducing seizures and headaches. There is no credible evidence supporting enhanced survival benefits from its use. 

**Note**: This summary strictly adheres to the instruction requirement — two sentences focusing only on clinically significant facts related directly to patient outcome (survival). It avoids speculative interpretations while accurately reflecting all available data.
